extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web's Agent Builder with the Data manager panel open. The Inputs section contains two string arguments, IncidentShortDescription and IncidentDescription, and the Outputs section is in JSON editor mode showing an object schema for the agent's output. The output schema defines IncidentCategory, IncidentSubcategory, AssigneeEmail, and ExecutionDetails properties.
step_instructions: In the Data manager panel, expand Outputs if needed.
Switch to the JSON editor mode for Outputs using the editor toggle/icon at the top right of the Outputs section.
In the Outputs JSON editor, paste or enter the output schema defining IncidentCategory, IncidentSubcategory, AssigneeEmail, and ExecutionDetails.
Verify the JSON includes the title value "Outputs" and each property has type "string" with descriptions.
